subcodes.first_line: The Book hath indeed been sent down in truth; verily it is a revelation from One Who is All-Knowing, All-Informed. Whosoever acknowledgeth it hath indeed recognized the divine Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزل الکتاب بالحق انه لتنزیل من لدن علیم خبیر و الذی اقر به قد اعترف بکتب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @belief and denial, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @call to action
